title: The ex-Meta VP behind a notorious spy tool just raised $180M for AI security
summary: As Tech Funding News noted, Onavo became the basis of “Project Ghostbusters.” Court documents unsealed in 2024 showed Meta repurposed Onavo’s VPN to intercept and decrypt rivals’ encrypted traffic, targeting Snapchat, YouTube and Amazon.
caption: output/2026-07-22/the-ex-meta-vp-behind-a-notorious-spy-tool-just-raised-180m-for-ai-sec.txt
